name: Barbecued Pork Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare charcoal grill with medium-hot coals.
2. Stir together all ingredients except steaks in a small bowl; mix well.
3. Brush steaks on both sides with the sauce.
4. Place steaks on the grill about 4 inches above the coals.
5. Cook for about 8 minutes on each side, turning once and brushing the steaks with sauce again during grilling.
